scripts.dev: concurrently -n "gateway,auth,tenant,student,academic,finance,notify" -c "bgBlue,bgGreen,bgYellow,bgMagenta,bgCyan,bgRed,bgWhite" "npm run dev --prefix services/api-gateway" "npm run dev --prefix services/auth-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/tenant-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/student-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/academic-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/finance-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/notification-service"
scripts.dev:core: concurrently -n "gateway,auth" -c "bgBlue,bgGreen" "npm run dev --prefix services/api-gateway" "npm run dev --prefix services/auth-service"
scripts.dev:phase1: concurrently -n "gateway,auth,tenant,student,academic" -c "bgBlue,bgGreen,bgYellow,bgMagenta,bgCyan" "npm run dev --prefix services/api-gateway" "npm run dev --prefix services/auth-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/tenant-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/student-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/academic-service"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix services/api-gateway && npm run build --prefix services/auth-service
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix services/auth-service && npm run test --prefix services/tenant-service && npm run test --prefix services/student-service && npm run test --prefix services/academic-service && npm run test --prefix services/finance-service
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test --prefix services/auth-service -- --coverage && npm run test --prefix services/tenant-service -- --coverage && npm run test --prefix services/student-service -- --coverage && npm run test --prefix services/academic-service -- --coverage && npm run test --prefix services/finance-service -- --coverage
